Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows mild renal impairment (slightly elevated serum creatinine), metabolic acidosis (low CO₂), and significant proteinuria and ketonuria. Urine is cloudy, brown, with low specific gravity, and contains glucose, bilirubin, and ketones, suggesting possible urinary tract pathology and/or dehydration. HbA1c is low, indicating no chronic hyperglycemia. Recommend further evaluation for renal function, possible infection, and metabolic disturbances.
